episodes.title: Epstein deposition videos: Hillary Clinton clashes with lawmakers, Bill Clinton speaks on hot tub ph
episodes.description: Epstein deposition videos: Hillary Clinton clashes with lawmakers, Bill Clinton speaks on hot tub photo

episodes.title: More high-profile names under scrutiny in Epstein files fallout
episodes.description: Larry Summers will retire from Harvard amid scrutiny over Epstein ties, while Bill Gates apologizes to foundation staff for meetings with Epstein.

episodes.title: Epstein files spark new investigations
episodes.description: Epstein investigations are underway in at least 10 countries, the DOJ releases documents in the U.S., but critics question redactions of possible co-conspirators.

episodes.title: Backlash grows after release of final Epstein files
episodes.description: A new wave of backlash is emerging following the final release of Epstein files, with political fallout spreading in the U.K. as scrutiny intensifies.

episodes.title: Department of Justice under fire over Epstein files release
episodes.description: The Department of Justice is facing heavy criticism for how it’s releasing court documents linked to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
